# Open Positions

## Research Positions

**Data scientist/bioinformatician** [(AN: 1081-2023)](https://short.sg/j/39410906) \
**Research technician - Quantitative Immunology** [(AN: 1079-2023)](https://short.sg/j/39413244) \
**Post-doctoral researcher - Quantitative Immunology** [(AN: 1080-2023)](https://short.sg/j/39414511)

## Student assistants (HiWi, 10-20h/week)

We offer jobs for student assistants to work in an exciting and interdisciplinary environment and directly contribute to our current research projects. Candidates should have hands-on experience in programming (R or python) and linux operating systems.

**Research tasks:**

- software development and data analysis for our ongoing research projects
- development of interactive visualization tools for our collaborative research projects
- data management and software maintenance

Applications via email to [ag.imkeller | gmail.com](mailto:ag.imkeller@gmail.com) - please include a motivation letter, CV and transcripts of records.

## Thesis projects (BSc/MSc) and student internships

We offer internships, Bachelor’s and Master’s theses in different research areas of computational immunology. \

```{=html}
<div  style="margin: 30px; text-align: center;">
<a class="button-52" href="../projects/index.qmd" role="button" target="_blank" style="link-color: black; link-hover-decoration: none; color: black;">Older Projects</a>
</div>

```

Applications via email to [ag.imkeller | gmail.com]() - please include a motivation letter, CV and transcripts of records.
